name: Jeevika Shiv
role: Thematic Lead, Feminist Movements and Leadership, UN Women
body: Jeevika works with UN Women headquarters as Thematic Coordination Lead for Feminist Movements and Leadership under Generation Equality. A lawyer by training, she has spent six years with UN Women on gender equality, leadership, and systems strategy. She is also a facilitator and group analyst in training, working at the intersection of human rights and systems dynamics.
